metrics.name: stackra.age_group.create.duration_ms
metrics.description: End-to-end provisioning latency (validate + write row + fire events).

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.bounds_changed.total
metrics.description: How often bounds change per tenant. High rate is a red flag — bounds changes may invalidate downstream athlete eligibility.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.cutoff_changed.total
metrics.description: Cutoff-kind transitions. Feeds the safeguarding-drift dashboard.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.default_changed.total
metrics.description: How often the default flips per (tenant, org, sport_key) tuple.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.archived.total
metrics.description: outcome: soft (deleted_at set) / hard (PurgeArchivedAgeGroupsJob completed) / rejected_in_use / rejected_default / rejected_seeded.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.active.count
metrics.description: Point-in-time count of AgeGroups per youth/seeded flag. Populated hourly by the metrics-snapshot task.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.per_tenant.count
metrics.description: Global histogram of age-groups-per-tenant. Feeds the tier-adoption dashboard.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.default_invariant_drift.count
metrics.description: drift_kind: zero_default / multiple_default. Populated by ReconcileAgeGroupDefaultInvariantJob. Ideally always 0.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.slot_exhaustion.total
metrics.description: How often age_group_slot entitlement refuses a custom create. Feeds the upsell funnel.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.custom_disabled_refusals.total
metrics.description: How often a Small-tier tenant is refused with AGE_GROUP_CUSTOM_DISABLED. Signals a tenant that has outgrown the seeded catalog + is a Medium upgrade candidate.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.sport_specific_refusals.total
metrics.description: How often AGE_GROUP_SPORT_SPECIFIC_DISABLED fires. Signals a Medium-tier tenant that needs Enterprise's sport-specific features.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.resolver.total
metrics.description: outcome: matched / indeterminate / not_found. sport_key_present: bool.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.resolver.duration_ms
metrics.description: AgeGroupResolver latency. cache_status: hit / miss. P99 target < 20ms when cold, < 3ms when warm.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.seed_catalog.duration_ms
metrics.description: SeedDefaultAgeGroupsForTenantJob end-to-end latency. source: tenant_provisioning / reconciler / legacy_backfill_command.

metrics.name: stackra.age_group.purge_pending.count
metrics.description: Archived AgeGroups past their 1095-day retention window that haven't been hard-deleted yet. Feeds the `age-group-purge-queue-drained` health probe.
